description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a spacious, open layout. The front features a driveway with two parked cars, a row of trees, and a sidewalk, giving it a suburban residential feel. The house has a large central courtyard with palm trees and a wooden deck, visible from multiple angles. The exterior walls are light-colored, and the windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some large glass panels facing the courtyard. The property is enclosed by a perimeter wall, providing privacy and a sense of enclosure. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with outdoor elements.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, central courtyard, and light exterior walls, surrounded by a perimeter wall and landscaped with trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, two cars, row of trees, and the main entrance with a clear view of the courtyard and palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, perimeter wall, and partial visibility of the courtyard and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the enclosed backyard, central courtyard, and the flat roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway entrance, trees, and the extended layout of the house along the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no porch, flanked by trees and accessed via a driveway, minimal decorative elements.
